lobe.name: Svrn7.Federation
lobe.title: SVRN7 Federation LOBE
lobe.description: Federation-level DID management, key pair generation, citizen/society registry, and base transfer operations. Wraps ISvrn7Driver. Loaded eagerly at TDA startup.
lobe.author: Michael Herman

cmdlets.name: New-Svrn7Did
cmdlets.title: Generate New DID
cmdlets.description: Generates a new did:drn DID for a citizen or society from a key pair and method name.

cmdlets.name: New-Svrn7KeyPair
cmdlets.title: Generate Key Pair
cmdlets.description: Generates a new secp256k1 key pair for a citizen or society.

ai._note: Epoch 0: these fields are informational for human and AI developers. inputSchema/outputSchema on each cmdlet are optional in Epoch 0. In a future epoch, an AI pipeline composer will consume this descriptor directly — possibly via an MCP-compatible tools/list interface — to discover, understand, and dynamically compose LOBE pipelines. The LOBE descriptor will become the MCP tool definition with no translation needed.
ai.summary: Foundation LOBE providing DID generation, key pair management, and base registry operations. Always loaded eagerly. All other LOBEs depend on these primitives.
useCases: Generate a new citizen DID and key pair during onboarding
compositionHints: Call New-Svrn7KeyPair first, then pipe or pass to New-Svrn7Did
limitations: Epoch 0: secp256k1 only. Ed25519 key management added in future epoch.
